Competitive Context

You're ahead of roughly 80% of B2B companies at your stage. The focus now is optimization: tightening the loops between data, action, and learning.

61%
Quota attainment at AI-native companies vs. 56% traditional
5 wks
Faster average sales cycle for AI-native GTM teams
3–4x
More accounts per rep with AI-native outbound architecture
Your Priority Actions
Priority 1
Rebuild outbound around signal triggers
The highest-converting outbound fires when specific intent signals appear on target accounts — not on a schedule. Implement workflows that make timing automatic and contextually relevant.
Priority 2
Implement AI-driven revenue attribution
Connect every GTM activity to revenue outcomes automatically. This is how you justify your AI investments to your board and know which programs to double down on.
Priority 3
Redesign GTM architecture for AI-first scale
AI-native GTM means your pipeline capacity is decoupled from headcount. A properly architected system lets your current team handle 3–4x the accounts without proportional people cost.

Want to talk through what the transformation looks like for Treetop Growth Strategy?

30 minutes. No pitch deck. We'll look at your score, discuss where competitors are pulling ahead, and map out what an AI-native overhaul would realistically involve for your organization.
